title: xyris drummondii
intro: Xyris drummondii, also known as Drummond's yellow-eyed grass, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Xyridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Xyris drummondii include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its use as a diuretic. Xyris drummondii is typically prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses.
